description: Image-only PDF — OCR via tesseract (jpn) with multi-pass preprocessing.
notes: Payment amount on each row = 税込 value → GT before_tax_income_jpy.
Titles come in 4 families: 再婚承認を要求します / 生まれ変わってもよろしく / 喧嘩独学 / ザ・ボクサー.
Rate is always 50% royalty. payment = input_amt // 2 (floor).
MangaMee rows are AD type, channel='manga mee'.
Jumptoon rows split by 販路: 単行本版 vs 話配信 → channel_title_jp suffix differs ('単行本' vs '話配信'); both EB type, channel='Jumptoon'.
